COURSE WORKBOOK
with Gretta Van Riel, Rob Ward, Chase Dimond
Richard Li, Nick Shackelford
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 3 --

We’ve just covered one method for influencer
outreach: the Instagram direct message/email
message. The other way we reach out to our
influencers is through a platform called Woodpecker.
In this lesson, you’ll learn about Woodpecker as well
as my go-to platform to track the success of my
influencer campaigns: PeopleMap.
LESSON:
AUTOMATING INFLUENCER
OUTREACH
MODULE:
ADVANCED INFLUENCER
MARKETING
ACTION ITEMS
❏ 	Create a blank Instagram account.
❏ 	Follow 100-1000 influencers on that account.
❏ 	Fill out the Influencer Acquisition Flow in the
bonus lesson.
❏ 	Hire a VA and reach out to your influencer
prospects using email, DM or Woodpecker.
TOOLS & RESOURCES
• 	Woodpecker (Automate Cold Emails &
Follow-Ups)
• 	PeopleMap (Instagram Research
Tracking and Growth Tools)
